What We Offer

Our Professional Services

Expert painting, marble art, texture finishes and rendering for every space.

🏠

Interior Painting

Flawless interior finishes with eco-safe paints. Living rooms, bedrooms, offices and more.

🏢

Exterior Painting

Weather-resistant coatings that protect your building and boost curb appeal.

🖼

Marble and Texture Art

Stunning marble effects, Venetian plaster, stencil art and 3D texture finishes.

🔨

Finishing and Rendering

Smooth wall rendering, surface prep and premium decorative finishing work.

🎨

Color Consultation

AI-powered color palette suggestions tailored to your space and style.

🖌

Mural and Wall Art

Custom wall murals from emerald gold abstract to navy marble statement walls.

Transparent Pricing

All Prices Are Negotiable

Every job is unique. The ranges below are estimates - we discuss and agree before we start.

🤝

Prices Are Always Open to Discussion

Contact us with your job details and we will give you the best fair price. Call 07066384681 or WhatsApp us.

Basic

Small Spaces

Negotiable
Estimated range:
20,000 to 60,000 naira depending on room size, condition, and paint grade.
  • 1 to 2 rooms covered
  • Standard emulsion paint
  • 1 color per room
  • Wall preparation included
  • 2-day turnaround
  • Premium eco-paint
  • Marble or texture effects
Discuss Price
Most Popular
Standard

Apartments

Negotiable
Estimated range:
80,000 to 200,000 naira for full apartment interiors. Discuss your floor plan with us.
  • Up to 3 bedrooms plus living room
  • Premium eco-friendly paint
  • Up to 3 colors
  • Full surface preparation
  • 3 to 5 day turnaround
  • Free color consultation
  • Minor crack filling
Discuss Price
Premium

Full House and Art

Negotiable
Estimated range:
200,000 to 600,000+ naira for full homes with marble art, murals, or texture finishes.
  • Full house all rooms
  • Premium eco-paint plus varnish
  • Unlimited colors
  • Interior plus exterior
  • Marble and texture art included
  • Custom wall murals
  • 1-year touch-up warranty
Discuss Price

All paints are eco-certified, low-VOC, and safe for children and pets.
